title: David Rasmussen
text: Home * People * David Rasmussen David Rasmussen [1] David Ravn Rasmussen , a Danish computer scientist and as computer chess programmer, author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol compatible chess engine Chezzz [2] . In his 2004 Master's thesis at Technical University of Denmark , Lyngby , Copenhagen , David covers parallel search and bitboard techniques such as rotated bitboards [3] .
